heading: Laws applicable
label: 275 Laws applicable
text: The general provisions of sections 181 to 184, 185 to 188, 189 to 192, 193, and 194 of this title, are made applicable to permits and leases under this subchapter, sections 181 and 193 of this title being amended to include deposits of sulphur, and being amended so as to prohibit any person, association, or corporation from taking or holding more than three sulphur permits or leases in any one State during the life of such permits or leases.1section 184 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1
